summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Tilt AI decision layer app. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend landing page renders correctly with all required data-testid attributes. Claude Sonnet 4.5 vision and decision generation APIs working correctly via Emergent LLM Key.
passed_tests: GET /api/health returns 200 OK with status and timestamp
POST /api/analyze-screen accepts base64 JPEG image and returns context/activity
POST /api/analyze-screen handles data URI prefix correctly
POST /api/generate-decisions works with user_preference and tone_traits
POST /api/generate-decisions works with all parameters combined
Full integration flow: analyze screen -> generate decisions
Landing page renders with 'Decide better, together.' headline
'Start Decision Layer' button present and clickable
All data-testid attributes present in FloatingPalette, CommandPalette, ScreenShareView, LandingPage
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working correctly. Screen sharing flow cannot be fully automated due to browser permissions requirement. Document Picture-in-Picture API requires Chrome 116+ and user gesture. The /api/analyze-screen endpoint may 403 through external proxy for large payloads - use localhost:8001 for backend testing.
